LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LOMIO MAHE AND AIRLINE COACH SERVICE, INC.'S STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-560307 WITH CASE CGC-17-560309 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Nov-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-560307 WITH CASE CGC-17-560309
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LOMIO MAHE, AIRLINE COACH SERVICE, INC.'s STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-560307 WITH CASE CGC-17-560309.

GRANTED. No opposition filed. Cases CGC-17-560309 and CGC-17-560307 are consolidated for all purposes. The court designates case CGC-17-560307 as the lead case and all future filings should be made under that case number.

An order is signed for Line 9 - 560307 and Line 10 - 560309. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS LOMIO MAHE and AIRLINE COACH SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.

Moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220, email: robertbalian.csr@gmail.com
